fields.helpText: This field is used to name containers that are used by lab to ship specimens to other testing facilities. Enter the name of containers using a standard nomenclature, such as tube, plastic, 2ml.

This field describes the type of shipping container, whether it is the original specimen container (primary), a container that the specimen is transferred for shipping purposes (aliquot) or the container which is used to ship the specimens to another facility (packaging).
